title: Mumbai University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Mumbai University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Mumbai University Result 2026 Out for 3rd and 5th Semester B.Ed, B.Com, T.Y.B.A, M.Sc Hotel & Hospitality Administration and BFA courses on the official website - mu.ac.in on 25 May 2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Mumbai University result.

content.text: Mumbai University Result 2026 has been officially released for several UG and PG courses including M.Sc Hotel & Hospitality Administration Sem V (CBCGS), B.Com Sem VI (CBCS CDOE), T.Y.B.A Sem V (CBCS Culinary Arts), Final Year Bachelor of Fine Arts (Applied Art) and B.Ed Sem III (CBCS Two Year Course). These semester examinations were conducted for the 2025-26 academic session, and the university has now published the result PDFs online for all listed programmes.

Mumbai University Result 2026 has been released online on the official result portal - https://www.mumresults.in/ with detailed course-wise PDF links and can also be accessed through the main website mu.ac.in. Students can open the relevant result code link, such as 1S02315, 2C01006, 4O01615, 4O02434, or 4E00143, to download their marksheets in PDF format and check subject-wise scores.

Students are advised to carefully verify their name, seat number, course name, semester, and marks printed on the online result PDF. In case of any discrepancy or mismatch in marks or personal details, candidates should immediately contact the University of Mumbai examination department or their respective colleges for necessary corrections and clarification.

Mumbai University has updated its result portal with the latest UG and PG semester results for professional, arts, commerce, education, and fine arts courses. The results include M.Sc Hotel & Hospitality Administration, B.Com distance education, T.Y.B.A Culinary Arts, BFA Applied Art and B.Ed third semester, giving a wide group of students access to their academic performance for the 2026 result year. All results are hosted as downloadable PDFs, enabling quick viewing and printing for provisional use.

content.text: Mumbai University has activated direct PDF links to check M.Sc, B.Com, T.Y.B.A, BFA and B.Ed semester results for the 2026 result session. Students can instantly view or download their marksheets from the official result portal by clicking on the appropriate course link given in the table below. The PDFs contain college-wise and seat number-wise details, so candidates must carefully locate their seat number and confirm their marks and result status.

sections.heading: Steps to Check Mumbai University Result 2026

content.text: Follow the simple steps given below to check and download Mumbai University Result 2026 online:

items: Visit the official Mumbai University result portal at https://www.mumresults.in/

On the homepage, search for your course and semester using the result code or course name (for example, M.Sc Hotel & Hospitality Administration Sem V, B.Com Sem VI, T.Y.B.A Sem V, BFA, or B.Ed Sem III).
Click on the corresponding result link to open the PDF file in your browser.
Once the PDF opens, use the search function (Ctrl+F) and type your seat number or name.
Check your subject-wise marks, total marks, grade and result status as mentioned in the PDF.
Download the PDF file and save it on your device or take a printout for future reference and admission or document verification purposes.
